'''savuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featheredge|featheredge]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-v-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featheredge|featheredge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| savuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sævijith|sævijith]] || [[word:sævijij|sævijij]] || [[word:sævijish|sævijish]] || [[word:sæviji|sæviji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:savuvujuth|savuvujuth]] || [[word:savuvujuj|savuvujuj]] || [[word:savuvujush|savuvujush]] || [[word:savuvuju|savuvuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:savujuth|savujuth]] || [[word:savujuj|savujuj]] || [[word:savujush|savujush]] || [[word:savuju|savuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:savufjuth|savufjuth]] || [[word:savufjuj|savufjuj]] || [[word:savufjush|savufjush]] || [[word:savufjuf|savufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:savujuthu|savujuthu]] || [[word:savujuju|savujuju]] || [[word:savujushu|savujushu]] || [[word:savujuku|savujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:savujuth|savujuth]] || [[word:savujuj|savujuj]] || [[word:savujush|savujush]] || [[word:savuju|savuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:savujuthul|savujuthul]] || [[word:savujujul|savujujul]] || [[word:savujushul|savujushul]] || [[word:savujukul|savujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:savujuthuthu|savujuthuthu]] || [[word:savujujuju|savujujuju]] || [[word:savujushushu|savujushushu]] || [[word:savujuku|savujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:savujuthun|savujuthun]] || [[word:savujujun|savujujun]] || [[word:savujushun|savujushun]] || [[word:savujukun|savujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:savujuthuoro|savujuthuoro]] || [[word:savujujuoro|savujujuoro]] || [[word:savujushuoro|savujushuoro]] || [[word:savujukuoro|savujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
